_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: The Lord of the Rings: Return to Moria
author: contact@nimauria.co.uk
description: The only survival crafting game set in the Fourth Age of Middle-earth™. Embark on an epic journey to reclaim the Dwarven homeland of Moria, and explore, craft, and build in procedurally generated worlds. Play as a solo adventurer, or join friends in co-op gameplay for up to 8 players.
startup: wine ./Moria/Binaries/Win64/MoriaServer-Win64-Shipping.exe -log & MORIA_PID=$!; LOG="./Moria/Saved/Logs/Moria.log"; for i in {1..20}; do [ -f "$LOG" ] && break; sleep 1; done; [ -f "$LOG" ] && tail -n +1 -F "$LOG" --pid=$MORIA_PID 2>/dev/null || { echo "Log file not found, continuing without tail..."; wait $MORIA_PID; }

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Starting Return to Moria install..."

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
STEAM_USER="${STEAM_USER:-}"
STEAM_PASS="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
STEAM_AUTH="${STEAM_AUTH:-}"
SRCDS_APPID="${SRCDS_APPID:-3349480}"
AUTO_UPDATE="${AUTO_UPDATE:-1}"

if [[ -z "${STEAM_USER}" || -z "${STEAM_PASS}" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER="anonymous"
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}\n"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps

echo "Downloading SteamCMD..."
curl -fsSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz

echo "Extracting SteamCMD..."
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd

cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# Matches the older installer behaviour more closely
chown -R root:root /mnt || true
export HOME=/mnt/server

echo "Installing Return to Moria Dedicated Server (App ID: ${SRCDS_APPID})..."

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "anonymous" ]]; then
    if [[ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "0" || "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "false" ]]; then
        ./steamcmd.sh \
          +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
          +login anonymous \
          +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
          +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" \
          +quit
    else
        ./steamcmd.sh \
          +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
          +login anonymous \
          +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
          +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" validate \
          +quit
    fi
else
    if [[ -n "${STEAM_AUTH}" ]]; then
        if [[ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "0" || "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "false" ]]; then
            ./steamcmd.sh \
              +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
              +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" "${STEAM_AUTH}" \
              +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
              +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" \
              +quit
        else
            ./steamcmd.sh \
              +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
              +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" "${STEAM_AUTH}" \
              +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
              +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" validate \
              +quit
        fi
    else
        if [[ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "0" || "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "false" ]]; then
            ./steamcmd.sh \
              +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
              +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" \
              +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
              +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" \
              +quit
        else
            ./steamcmd.sh \
              +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
              +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" \
              +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
              +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" validate \
              +quit
        fi
    fi
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -fv linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -fv linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

if [[ ! -f /mnt/server/.pteroignore ]]; then
    echo "Creating .pteroignore for optimized backups"
    cat << 'EOF' > /mnt/server/.pteroignore
steamcmd
steamapps
*.log
*.tmp
*.bak
Saved/Crashes
Saved/Logs
EOF
fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: World Name
variables.description:
Name of the world save file to load or create. 
If the file does not exist, a new world will be generated using this name.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Optional password required to join the server. Case-sensitive.

variables.name: World Type
variables.description: World generation mode for newly created worlds.

variables.name: Custom Combat Difficulty
variables.description: Enemy base damage and hit points. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom Enemy Aggression
variables.description: Enemy aggression level. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom Survival Difficulty
variables.description: Survival pressure and related survival tuning. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom Mining Drops
variables.description: Ore yield from mining veins. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom World Drops
variables.description: Loot drop rates from enemies and world rewards. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom Horde Frequency
variables.description: How often noisy actions trigger a horde. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Custom Patrol Frequency
variables.description: How often enemy patrol groups spawn. Used when Difficulty Preset is custom.

variables.name: Optional DLC
variables.description: Optional DLC content to enable for newly created worlds.

variables.name: Upgrade Existing World DLC
variables.description: DLC content to apply when upgrading an existing world.

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam application ID for the dedicated server.

variables.name: Install Windows Server Build
variables.description: Required because the official dedicated server build is Windows-only.

variables.name: Winetricks Packages
variables.description: Winetricks components to install for Wine compatibility.

variables.name: Auto Update Server
variables.description: Controls whether the server automatically checks for and installs updates during startup. Set to true to enable automatic updates or false to disable.
